'''kakumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabab|kabab]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-k-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabab|kabab]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kakumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kækimith|kækimith]] || [[word:kækimij|kækimij]] || [[word:kækimish|kækimish]] || [[word:kækimi|kækimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kakukumuth|kakukumuth]] || [[word:kakukumuj|kakukumuj]] || [[word:kakukumush|kakukumush]] || [[word:kakukumu|kakukumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kakumuth|kakumuth]] || [[word:kakumuj|kakumuj]] || [[word:kakumush|kakumush]] || [[word:kakumu|kakumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kakufmuth|kakufmuth]] || [[word:kakufmuj|kakufmuj]] || [[word:kakufmush|kakufmush]] || [[word:kakufmuf|kakufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kakumuthu|kakumuthu]] || [[word:kakumuju|kakumuju]] || [[word:kakumushu|kakumushu]] || [[word:kakumuku|kakumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kakumuth|kakumuth]] || [[word:kakumuj|kakumuj]] || [[word:kakumush|kakumush]] || [[word:kakumu|kakumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kakumuthul|kakumuthul]] || [[word:kakumujul|kakumujul]] || [[word:kakumushul|kakumushul]] || [[word:kakumukul|kakumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kakumuthuthu|kakumuthuthu]] || [[word:kakumujuju|kakumujuju]] || [[word:kakumushushu|kakumushushu]] || [[word:kakumuku|kakumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kakumuthun|kakumuthun]] || [[word:kakumujun|kakumujun]] || [[word:kakumushun|kakumushun]] || [[word:kakumukun|kakumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kakumuthuoro|kakumuthuoro]] || [[word:kakumujuoro|kakumujuoro]] || [[word:kakumushuoro|kakumushuoro]] || [[word:kakumukuoro|kakumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
